title: WOS API Signature Ceremony
description: Public API resource schema for WOS signature ceremonies. A `SignatureCeremony` is the aggregate projection of a WOS signing ceremony — the FSM state that tracks which signers have signed, declined, or expired across a document or transition. Distinct from `signature` tasks (`task.schema.json` `TaskKind.signature`), `signatureAffirmation` provenance records (`provenance.schema.json` `FactsRecordKind.signatureAffirmation`), and the signature profile author-time declaration (`wos-workflow.schema.json` `signature` embedded block). The ceremony aggregate lets the case portal answer "who hasn't signed yet?" and lets an operator inspect the full ceremony FSM without reconstructing from per-task / per-provenance records. Per ADR 0082 D-15 step 6, this domain pairs with `task.schema.json` (per-signer task lifecycle) to close the signature API surface.

ActorRef.description: Stable actor reference from the identity/governance subsystem (ADR 0082 D-9). Hoisted to `_common.schema.json` per PLN-0404.

WosResourceUrn.description: Public WOS API resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4). Hoisted to `_common.schema.json` per PLN-0404.

SignerRole.description: Closed signer-role taxonomy per signature profile §2.2.

SignerStatus.description: Closed per-signer lifecycle status. `pending` = signer assigned but not yet notified; `notified` = signer received notification; `viewed` = signer opened the document; `signed` = signer completed signing; `declined` = signer declined to sign; `expired` = signing window closed before signer acted.

SignerState.description: Per-signer state within a signature ceremony. Tracks the individual signer's lifecycle from assignment through terminal state.

actorRef.description: URN-form reference to the signer actor.

signedAt.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp when the signer completed signing.

declinedAt.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp when the signer declined.

SignatureFlowPattern.description: Closed signing flow pattern per signature profile §2.3. `sequential` = signers act in order, each gating the next; `parallel` = all signers act independently; `routed` = signers are dispatched by a routing rule (e.g. by role or org unit); `free-for-all` = any signer can act in any order.

SignatureCeremonyStatus.description: Closed ceremony lifecycle posture. `awaiting-signatures` = ceremony active, signers pending; `complete` = all required signers have signed; `declined` = a signer declined and the ceremony reached a terminal state; `expired` = signing window elapsed; `voided` = ceremony was administratively voided.

SignatureCeremony.description: Aggregate projection of a WOS signing ceremony — the FSM state tracking which signers have signed, declined, or expired across a document or transition.

id.description: Stable public URN for this signature ceremony. Entity-type segment MUST be signature-ceremony.

processId.description: Workflow process URN this ceremony belongs to.

taskId.description: Optional signature task URN this ceremony is bound to (when the workflow gates a transition on a signature task).

documentRef.description: Workflow document or transition identifier being signed.

signers.description: Ordered signers in this ceremony. Order reflects the flow pattern (sequential = order matters, parallel = order is informational).

intentUri.description: Registered signing-intent URI from the signature profile §2.11 registry (e.g. 'https://wos-spec.org/signing-intent/esign-consent').

createdAt.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp when the ceremony was created.

completedAt.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp when the ceremony reached a terminal state (complete, declined, expired, or voided).

expiresAt.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp or the literal 'never' sentinel (ADR 0082 D-10) for ceremonies without an expiry window.

items.description: Signature ceremony records in this page.

cursor.description: Opaque token for the next page. Omitted when hasMore is false.

hasMore.description: True when another page is available from the server.
